title: nie-tui ratatui layout and render pipeline
description:
**What:** Implement the ratatui UI layout and render function in tui/src/ui.rs — 4-panel layout with online users, chat log, input box, and status bar.

**Algorithm:**
1. Create tui/src/ui.rs.
2. Implement draw(f: &mut Frame, state: &AppState):
   a. Split frame area vertically: [top_row (Fill), input_row (Length 3), status_row (Length 1)].
   b. Split top_row horizontally: [users_col (Percentage 20), chat_col (Fill 1)].
   c. Call draw_users(f, users_col, state).
   d. Call draw_chat(f, chat_col, state).
   e. Call draw_input(f, input_row, state).
   f. Call draw_status(f, status_row, state).
   g. After drawing, position cursor: if state.focus == Focus::Input, set cursor at input_row.x+1 + state.input_cursor_visual(), input_row.y+1.
3. draw_users(f, area, state):
   - Block with title "Online" and Borders::ALL.
   - Build ListItem vector from state.online sorted by display_name (sort a copy — DO NOT sort state.online in place).
   - Mark online[0] with [A] prefix (admin by connection sequence).
   - Highlight own pub_id.
   - Render with List::new().
4. draw_chat(f, area, state):
   - Block with title "Chat" and Borders::ALL.
   - Compute visible_lines = area.height.saturating_sub(2) as usize.
   - Take last visible_lines lines from state.messages, accounting for scroll_offset.
   - Format each ChatLine: timestamp, colored pub_id prefix, text.
   - Strip ANSI escape sequences from text before rendering (use a simple state machine: if char == '\x1b', skip until 'm' or non-CSI char).
   - Strip control characters (except newline): c.is_control() && c != '\n'.
   - Render as Paragraph with Text::from(lines).
5. draw_input(f, area, state):
   - Block with title matching focus (bold border when focused).
   - Render Paragraph::new(state.input.as_str()).block(...).
6. draw_status(f, area, state):
   - Single line: connection state | mls epoch | payment overlays (auto-dismiss after 5s).
   - Format: "[connected] MLS:active" or "[reconnecting in 5s]".
   - Show active payment overlay text if any.

**Defensive programming rules:**
- NEVER sort state.online in place — sort a copy for display only.
- Escape ANSI sequences: scan byte by byte, if 0x1B found, skip until 'm' byte or non-CSI terminal.
- Strip chars where c.is_control() && c != '\n' && c != '\t'.
- Truncate long lines to prevent layout overflow.
- draw() must never panic on empty state (guard: if online.is_empty(), display placeholder).

**Agent team:** Standard (R+I+V). R reads ratatui API docs in ~/.cargo/registry. I implements ui.rs. V runs cargo check -p nie-tui and verifies layout compiles.

**Tests:** Unit test draw with mock Frame (if ratatui provides TestBackend): verify no panic on empty state, verify ANSI stripping removes escape sequences, verify control char stripping.
acceptance_criteria: cargo check -p nie-tui exits 0; unit test with TestBackend renders without panic on empty AppState; ANSI escape \x1b[31m stripped from ChatLine text
